architecture.strategic_baseline_weight: research-only static control, proposed source config/etf_portfolio/assets.yaml default_weight
architecture.fast_asymmetric_risk_overlay: fast de-risk and slower or conditional re-entry
architecture.confidence_shrinkage: shrink dynamic output back toward strategic baseline under weak evidence
architecture.execution_turnover_control: no-trade band, turnover budget and benefit-over-cost gate

signal_to_score_contract: Signal layer emits normalized score and confidence; allocator consumes score only after schema/data-quality checks pass.
score_to_tilt_contract: Allocator maps score to bounded slow tilt around strategic baseline, then applies confidence shrinkage.
risk_state_to_exposure_contract: Risk-control layer emits a scalar/cap that can reduce exposure faster than it restores exposure.
execution_control_contract: Execution layer can leave research-only allocation unchanged when turnover cost exceeds expected benefit.

reader_brief.summary: 下一阶段权重控制拆成 signal、allocator、risk-control 和 execution layers，不再让单一 regime-to-weight 规则承担全部功能。
reader_brief.blocking_issues: B0 control 和 B1 execution-control runner 已完成；B1 证据 mixed，B2-B6 独立 runner 尚未实现，不得解释为策略上线。
reader_brief.warnings: 所有 allocation outputs 都是 research-only hypothetical allocation；B1 mixed evidence 不授权后续层自动执行。
reader_brief.safety_boundary: no paper-shadow, no official target weights, no broker/order, production_effect=none
reader_brief.next_action: review B1 mixed evidence before later mechanisms
